matches.x:
1. Thus saith the Lord God, the Mighty One of Israel, Behold, I say
 unto you, my servant Edward, that you are blessed and your sins are
 forgiven you, and you are called to preach my Gospel as with the
 voice of a trump;

1 THUS saith the Lord God, the Mighty One of Israel: Behold, I say unto you, my servant Edward, that you are blessed, and your sins are forgiven you, and you are called to preach my gospel as with the voice of a trump;

Thus saith the Lord God, the mighty one of Israel, behold I say unto you, my servant Edward, that you are blessed, and your sins are forgiven you, and you are called to preach my gospel as with the voice of a trumpet; and 1 will lay my hand upon you by the hand of my servant Sidney Rigdon, sad you shall receive my Spirit, the Holy Ghost, sren the Comforter, which shall teach you the peaceable…
